translations: If We (had) sent down this Quran
on a mountain surely you (would) have seen it humbled
And these examples We present them
to the people so that they may give thought
puzzle.hint: This verse describes the immense power of the Quran's revelation, using a mountain as an example of its potential impact.
puzzle.arabic: لَوْ أَنزَلْنَا هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عَلَىٰ جَبَلٍۢ لَّرَأَيْتَهُۥ خَـٰشِعًۭا مُّتَصَدِّعًۭا مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَمْثَـٰلُ نَضْرِبُهَا لِلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: If We had sent down this Qur’ān upon a mountain, you would have seen it humbled and splitting from fear of Allāh. And these examples We present to the people that perhaps they will give thought.
